title: Creamy Pesto Chicken Pasta Bake
ingredients: 1/2 cup sun-dried tomatoes with some of their oil
1 lb chicken, cut into bite-size pieces
1 tsp red pepper flakes, or to taste
1 tsp smoked paprika, or to taste
steps: Preheat the oven to 350°F and let the heavy cream come to room temperature.
Boil the pasta in salted water until just shy of al dente. Drain and set aside.
Heat a little sun-dried tomato oil in a large oven-safe skillet or Dutch oven. Season and cook the chicken until browned; remove it temporarily.
Melt in the butter. Cook the onion until softened, then add the garlic and seasonings.
Lower the heat and slowly stir in the cream. Add pesto, broccoli, spinach, chicken, and part of both cheeses.
Fold in the pasta. Top with the remaining Parmesan and mozzarella.
Bake until hot and bubbling, then garnish with parsley.
note: Costco pesto works especially well here. Add extra garlic or red pepper flakes to taste.

title: Onion Crunch Chicken
steps: Preheat the oven and prepare a lined baking sheet.
Season the chicken on both sides.
Crush the crispy onions and combine them with the coating.
Press the topping firmly onto the chicken.
Bake until golden and the chicken reaches a safe internal temperature.
note: This page is connected and ready for your exact Canva ingredient amounts when we add the full recipe data.

title: Caramel S'mores Bars
steps: Prepare the graham cracker base.
Layer with caramel and chocolate.
Top with marshmallows.
Bake or broil until toasted and set.
Cool before slicing.
note: The exact Canva measurements will replace this condensed version in the full recipe import.

title: Homemade Nutter Butters
steps: Shape and bake the peanut butter cookies.
Let them cool completely.
Mix the peanut butter filling.
Sandwich the filling between matching cookies.
note: The full Canva measurements will be inserted during the complete recipe import.

title: Challah Bread
steps: Mix and knead the enriched dough until smooth.
Let the dough rise until doubled.
Divide, roll, and braid the strands.
Proof the shaped loaf.
Brush with egg wash and bake until deeply golden.
note: The full Canva measurements will be inserted during the complete recipe import.
